evals.name: zed-happy-path
evals.prompt: I'm an Azir player. Using this matchup spreadsheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/YOUR_DRIVE_FILE_ID/edit?gid=0#gid=0 -- when I give you a champion, read its comment in the sheet, print the comment exactly as written, and then give me a briefing on how to play the matchup. No data is better than fake data. Champion: Zed
evals.expected_output: Prints Zed's verbatim Matchup Advice from the sheet (difficulty 'Skill Matchup'), then a briefing of 3 tips ranked by impact, sourced from r/AzirMains (with links) plus the spreadsheet, NOT a translation/restatement of the comment.

evals.name: naafiri-empty-cell
evals.prompt: I'm an Azir player. Using this matchup spreadsheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/YOUR_DRIVE_FILE_ID/edit?gid=0#gid=0 -- when I give you a champion, read its comment in the sheet, print the comment exactly as written, and then give me a briefing on how to play the matchup. No data is better than fake data. Champion: Naafiri
evals.expected_output: Recognizes Naafiri IS a row in the sheet but the advice cell is empty, says so honestly (does not invent a spreadsheet comment), then still delivers a 3-tip briefing from r/AzirMains with sources.

evals.name: hwei-not-in-sheet
evals.prompt: I'm an Azir player. Using this matchup spreadsheet https://docs.google.com/spreadsheets/d/YOUR_DRIVE_FILE_ID/edit?gid=0#gid=0 -- when I give you a champion, read its comment in the sheet, print the comment exactly as written, and then give me a briefing on how to play the matchup. No data is better than fake data. Champion: Hwei
evals.expected_output: Recognizes Hwei is NOT listed in the sheet at all, says so honestly (no invented comment), then still delivers a 3-tip briefing from r/AzirMains with sources.
